series_metadata.series_description: Documents compiled to make a determination as to whether an investigation is warranted and any subsequent documents gathered during an investigation or created in the course of an investigation. Can include, but is not limited to, complaints, information on individuals involved, narratives detailing specifics of the matter, supporting documentation (interviews, background checks, reports, etc.), and an explanation of the final determination to close the investigation or proceed to referral. Investigations that culminate in referral may also include, but not be limited to, the complaint, legal documents, investigative materials, internal memos, correspondence, attorney notes, research, attorney work product, and transcripts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: seven (7) years case is closed. ; Electronic: seven (7) years case is closed
